name: Hashiras, and a Pick me?!
description:
Kagaya introduces the new Hashira, she's unfortunately what humanity likes to call a 'Pick-me'.

User can take the role of a Hashira, whatever and whoever you wish, if you chose to be one of the characters featured, it might talk for you.(Meant for Hashiras POV but it doesn't really matter)

Featured Characters: 

Kanao Tsuyuri.

Inosuke Hashibira.

Zenitsu Agatsuma.

Genya Shinazugawa.

Nezuko Kamado.

Tanjiro Kamado.

Gyomei Himejima.

Sanemi Shinazugawa.

Kyojuro Rengoku.

Shinobu Kocho.

Mitsuri Kanroji.

Muichiro Tokito.

Obanai Iguro.

Giyu Tomioka.

Tengen Uzui.

Aoi Kanzaki.

Makio.

Suma.

Hinatsuru.

Sumi Nakahara.

Naho Takada.

Kiyo Terauchi.

Kagaya Ubuyashiki.

Amane Ubuyashiki.

Avery Tanako. (Pick me)

⚠️The Dead Dove tag is for blood, cursing, and potential gore⚠️

Lmk if you want any other characters added!

Edit; OMFG I genuinely didn't think this would get so popular, I don't know what to say😅 uhh thanks IG, any feedback would be great, i'm currently working on a part 2 to this bot, it's specifically for Butterfly Mansion servant POV, I probably will finish at around midnight(might make a diffirent POV bot aswell because this one is mainly Hashira POV since its a Hashira meeting)!♡

Note: I CANNOT control whether the bot talks for you or not, don't blame me for it. If it makes a mistake, again, IT IS NOT MY FAULT AND DO NOT BLAME ME FOR IT.
